mapper.insert:
insert into product_variants (product_id,sku,title,price,sale_price,stock_quantity,image_url) values
( #{item.productId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.sku, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.price, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.salePrice, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.stockQuantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.imageUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
